abilities.description: When you summon a flock of crows and ask a single question, roll +wits. On a strong hit, you interpret their calls as a helpful omen. Envision their response and take +2 momentum. On a weak hit, the crows ignore your question and offer a clue to an unrelated problem or opportunity in this area. Envision what you learn, and take +1 momentum.

As above, and the crows will also help guide you on the proper path. On a hit, add +1 on the next segment when you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.ed490d43a2533506]{Journey} or @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.3ff03b51f620ab26]{Undertake an Expedition}.
When you perform this ritual, add +1 and take +1 momentum on a hit.
